name: Tandoori Style Chicken Breasts with Yogurt Ci
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, puree the onion and garlic.
2. Process in the lemon juice and lime juice, then add spices and yogurt, processing until smooth.
3. Marinate the chicken breasts in this mixture, turning occasionally, overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Prepare a charcoal or wood fire and let it burn down to embers.
5. Remove excess marinade from the chicken breasts.
6. Grill for 5 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
7. Serve with Yogurt Cilantro sauce to taste.
